summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DSA Tracker app. Backend APIs fully functional (16/16 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working but critical SelectItem error prevents filter functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem components have empty string values causing runtime error: 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents filter functionality from working, shows error overlay

integration_issues.issue: Filter bar fails to load due to SelectItem error, preventing topic filtering

passed_tests: Add topic dialog and form submission
Topic card display and status updates
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix SelectItem components in FilterBar.js - ensure all SelectItem components have non-empty string values. The error occurs because SelectItem with empty string values are not allowed in the Select component. Need to either use null/undefined for empty values or provide proper default values.
